---
title: "UBUNTU Trial Threshold Correlates Analysis"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
  html_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
---

```{r, include = F, warning = F, message = F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = F, message = F, cache = T)

set.seed(10)

# devtools::install_github("jpspeng/npthreshold")
library(npthreshold)
library(SuperLearner)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sl3)
library(DT)
library(knitr)
library(msm)
library(data.table)
```

```{r}
df_ubuntu <- read.csv("COVID_realdata_ics_bama_nab_bcp20241210_processed_with_riskscore.csv")
dt_FS <- read.csv("dt_COMPASS_Spike BA4-5.csv")
dt_FS_index <- read.csv("dt_COMPASS_Spike Ancestral.csv")

# copied from Bo's email 
dt_B = dt_FS %>%
  mutate(PTID = paste0('C3008-', PTID),
         VISITNO = ifelse(VISITNO == 2, 'B', 'M1')) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Subjectid = PTID) %>%
  filter(VISITNO == 'B') %>%
  mutate(B_FS_final = FS_final,
         B_PFS_final = PFS_final) %>%
    dplyr::select(Subjectid, B_FS_final, B_PFS_final)

dt_M1 = dt_FS %>%
  mutate(PTID = paste0('C3008-', PTID),
         VISITNO = ifelse(VISITNO == 2, 'B', 'M1')) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Subjectid = PTID) %>%
  filter(VISITNO == 'M1') %>%
  mutate(M1_FS_final = FS_final,
         M1_PFS_final = PFS_final) %>%
  dplyr::select(Subjectid, M1_FS_final, M1_PFS_final)

df_ubuntu = merge(df_ubuntu, dt_B, by = 'Subjectid', all.x = TRUE)  
df_ubuntu = merge(df_ubuntu, dt_M1, by = 'Subjectid', all.x = TRUE)  

dt_B_Index = dt_FS_index %>%
  mutate(PTID = paste0('C3008-', PTID),
         VISITNO = ifelse(VISITNO == 2, 'B', 'M1')) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Subjectid = PTID) %>%
  filter(VISITNO == 'B') %>%
  mutate(B_FS_final_Index = FS_final,
         B_PFS_final_Index = PFS_final) %>%
    dplyr::select(Subjectid, B_FS_final_Index, B_PFS_final_Index)

dt_M1_Index = dt_FS_index %>%
  mutate(PTID = paste0('C3008-', PTID),
         VISITNO = ifelse(VISITNO == 2, 'B', 'M1')) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Subjectid = PTID) %>%
  filter(VISITNO == 'M1') %>%
  mutate(M1_FS_final_Index = FS_final,
         M1_PFS_final_Index = PFS_final) %>%
  dplyr::select(Subjectid, M1_FS_final_Index, M1_PFS_final_Index)

df_ubuntu = merge(df_ubuntu, dt_B_Index, by = 'Subjectid', all.x = T)  
df_ubuntu = merge(df_ubuntu, dt_M1_Index, by = 'Subjectid', all.x = T)  

```


```{r}
# pre-processing 
df_ubuntu <- df_ubuntu %>% 
  mutate(HIVBL = factor(HIVBL), 
         enrollment_period = ifelse(CalendarDateEnrollment <= 90, "early", 
                                    ifelse(CalendarDateEnrollment <= 180, "mid", "late")), 
         Country = factor(Country), 
         hybrid = AGRP2N %in% c(2.1, 4.1) + 0)

```


```{r}
# helper functions to select quantiles
select_quants <- function(df, event_var, marker_var){
  
  max_thresh <- df %>% 
    filter(.data[[event_var]] == 1) %>% 
    arrange(desc(.data[[marker_var]])) %>% 
    slice(3) %>% 
    pull(.data[[marker_var]]) 
  
  quants <- c(seq(min(df[,marker_var], na.rm = T), max_thresh, 0.1), max_thresh)
  
  quants
}

```

```{r}
# modified thresholdSurv function to allow for differing weights for the rcdf and
# the estimation 
thresholdSurv <- function(data,
                          covariates,
                          failure_time,
                          event_type,
                          marker,
                          tf,
                          weights = NULL,
                          weights_cdf = NULL,
                          threshold_list = NULL,
                          nbins_time = 20,
                          # nbins_threshold = 20,
                          verbose = FALSE,
                          learner.treatment = NULL,
                          learner.event_type = NULL,
                          learner.failure_time = NULL,
                          learner.censoring_time = NULL,
                          placebo_risk = NULL,
                          placebo_se = NULL,
                          modify_left_point = F,
                          left_estimate = NA,
                          left_se = NA
) {

  data <- data.table::as.data.table(data)
  tf <- as.numeric(tf)

  # set all weights to equal 1 if weights are NULL
  if (is.null(weights)){
    data$weights <- 1
    weights <- "weights"
  }
  if (is.null(weights_cdf)){
    data$weights_cdf <- 1
    weights_cdf <- "weights_cdf"
  }

  # subset to relevant variables
  data_select <- data[, c(covariates, failure_time,
                          event_type, marker, weights), with = FALSE]

  tmp_marker <- ifelse(data_select[[weights]] == 0, 0, data_select[[marker]])
  data.table::set(data_select, , marker, tmp_marker)

  if (any(is.na(data_select[[marker]]))) {
    stop("NAs in marker for threshold CR")
  }

  # discretize
  time_grid <- unique(quantile(data_select[[failure_time]],
                               seq(0, 1,length = nbins_time+1),
                               type = 1))

  # add time of interest to grid
  time_grid <- sort(union(time_grid, tf))
  failure_time_discrete <- findInterval(data_select[[failure_time]],
                                        time_grid, all.inside = TRUE)
  tf_discrete <- findInterval(tf, time_grid, all.inside = FALSE)
  data_select[[failure_time]] <- failure_time_discrete

  # if threshold list is null, then estimate on whole dataset
  if (is.null(threshold_list)){
    threshold_list <- min(data_select[[marker]], na.rm = T)
  }

  out_list <- list()

  covariates_matrix <- model.matrix(~ . - 1, data = data_select[, covariates, with = FALSE])


  for(threshold in threshold_list ) {
    if (verbose) print(paste0("THRESHOLD: ", threshold))

    try({
      data_select[["trt_temp"]] <- 1*(data_select[[marker]] >= threshold)
      if(sum(data_select[["trt_temp"]]) == 0){
        stop(sprintf("There were zero observations above the threshold %s.",
                     threshold))
      }

      survout <- survtmle3_discrete(data_select[[failure_time]],
                                    data_select[[event_type]],
                                    data_select[["trt_temp"]],
                                    covariates_matrix,
                                    weights = data_select[[weights]],
                                    learner.treatment =  learner.treatment,
                                    learner.failure_time =  learner.failure_time,
                                    learner.censoring_time = learner.censoring_time,
                                    learner.event_type = learner.event_type,
                                    target_failure_time = tf_discrete,
                                    target_treatment = c(1),
                                    target_event_type = 1,
                                    failure_time.stratify_by_time = FALSE,
                                    censoring_time.stratify_by_time = FALSE,
                                    cross_fit = FALSE,
                                    cross_validate = FALSE,
                                    calibrate = FALSE,
                                    verbose = verbose,
                                    max_iter = 100,
                                    tol = 1e-7
      )
    })

    if (is.null(threshold_list)){
      survout$threshold <- NA
    }
    else{
      survout$threshold <- threshold
    }
    out_list[[paste0(threshold)]] <- survout
  }

  res <- rbindlist(out_list)

  # make results table
  res$estimate <- unlist(res$estimates )
  res$se <- unlist(res$se )
  res$times <- tf

  n_in_bin <- sapply(threshold_list, function(thresh) {
    sum( data_select[[marker]] >= thresh)
  })

  n_events_in_bin <- sapply(threshold_list, function(thresh) {
    sum(data_select[data_select[[marker]] >= thresh , event_type, with = FALSE] == 1)
  })

  if (modify_left_point){
    res[1,"estimate"] <- left_estimate
    res[1, "se"] <- left_se
    res[1, "ci_lo"] <- left_estimate - (1.96 * left_se)
    res[1, "ci_hi"] <- left_estimate + (1.96 * left_se)

  }

  RCDF <- function(a) {
    sum(data[[weights_cdf]] * (data[[marker]] >= a)) /
      sum(data[[weights_cdf]])
  }

  RCDF <- Vectorize(RCDF)

  res$rcdf <- RCDF(res$threshold)

  res$n_in_bin <- n_in_bin
  res$n_events_in_bin <- n_events_in_bin

  n_event_cutoff <- 10

  weights_for_iso <- sqrt(n_in_bin)
  weights_for_iso[n_events_in_bin < n_event_cutoff] <- 0.01
  weights_for_iso <- weights_for_iso / sum(weights_for_iso)

  res$estimate_monotone <- -isotone::gpava(res$threshold,
                                               -res$estimate,
                                               weights = weights_for_iso)$x

  res$ci_lo <- unlist(res$CI)[ c(TRUE,FALSE) ]
  res$ci_hi <- unlist(res$CI)[ c(FALSE,TRUE) ]

  res$ci_lo_monotone <- res$estimate_monotone - (1.96 * res$se)
  res$ci_hi_monotone <- res$estimate_monotone + (1.96 * res$se)

  res <- res[,c("threshold", "rcdf", "n_in_bin", "n_events_in_bin", "estimate", "se",
                "ci_lo", "ci_hi", "estimate_monotone", "ci_lo_monotone", "ci_hi_monotone")]

  if (!is.null(placebo_risk) & !is.null(placebo_se)){
    res <- res %>%
      mutate(ve_monotone = 1 - (estimate_monotone / placebo_risk))

    res$ve_se <- apply(res, 1, calc_delta_method,
                       placebo_risk = placebo_risk,
                       placebo_se = placebo_se)

    res <- res %>%
      mutate(ve_monotone_ci_lo = ve_monotone - (1.96 * ve_se),
             ve_monotone_ci_hi = ve_monotone + (1.96 * ve_se))
  }

  res

}

calc_delta_method <- function(row, placebo_risk, placebo_se) {
  # Extract values from the row
  estimate_monotone <- row['estimate_monotone']
  estimate_se  <- row['se']

  # Variance-covariance matrix (assuming no covariance)
  cov_matrix <- matrix(c(estimate_se^2, 0, 0, placebo_se^2), nrow = 2)

  # Calculate the standard error using the delta method
  se_ratio <- deltamethod(~ x1 / x2, mean = c(estimate_monotone, placebo_risk),
                          cov = cov_matrix)

  return(se_ratio)
}


```


# Overview 

# Serum markers 

* **Covariates**: Risk score, HIVBL, Country (excluding enrollment_period)
* **Time variable**: EventTimePrimary
* **Event variable**: EventIndPrimary1
* **Marker variables**: BA45ID50, IGGSpikeIndex, IGGSpikeBA45, IGGN (for each, baseline, peak, and fold-rise)
* **Phase 1 filter**: ph1.m1.sera == 1
* **Phase 2 (sampling) filter**: ph2.m1.sera == 1
* **Weight variable**: wt.m1.sera
* **Timeframe**: 160 days (tried 165 days, but for the vaccine immunity group, latest observed timepoint was 161 days). 
  * Included 92 days for the M1 marker for the vaccine immunity group (adjusted for risk score only)
  * Risk graphs of with timeframe 92 days truncated above at 0.025 (monotone) and above 0.1 (for raw)
* Performed the analysis separately for the hybrid immunity and vaccine immunity groups 
* M0 = baseline, M1 = peak 
* Treatment learner: GLM
* Event type learner, failure time learner, censoring time learner: superlearner with 
glm, gam, and mean learners 
* Ignore the "Number in Bin" and "Events in Bin" columns in the table for now. These include 
censored observations (those with events after the specified timeframe). 

```{r}
# serum dataframe 
df_serum <- df_ubuntu %>%
  filter(ph1.m1.sera == 1) %>%
  mutate(log10M1BA45ID50 = log10(M1BA45ID50),
         log10BBA45ID50 = log10(BBA45ID50),
         frBA45ID50 = log10M1BA45ID50 - log10BBA45ID50,
         log10M1IGGSpikeIndex = log10(M1IGGMSDA16AU), #A16 = IgG S Index
         log10BIGGSpikeIndex = log10(BIGGMSDA16AU), 
         frIGGSpikeIndex = log10M1IGGSpikeIndex - log10BIGGSpikeIndex,
         log10M1IGGSpikeBA45 = log10(M1IGGMSDA23AU), # A23 = IgG S BA.4/5
         log10BIGGSpikeBA45 = log10(BIGGMSDA23AU), 
         frIGGSpikeBA45 = log10M1IGGSpikeBA45 - log10BIGGSpikeBA45,
         log10M1IGGN = log10(M1IGGMSDA15AU),
         log10BIGGN = log10(BIGGMSDA15AU))

# define serum variables 
antigen_vec = c('BA45ID50', 'IGGSpikeIndex', 'IGGSpikeBA45', 'IGGN')
antigen_names_vec = c('nAb ID50 BA.4/5', 'IgG S Index',  
                      'IgG S BA.4/5', 'IgG N Index')

mk_vec_b = paste0('log10B', antigen_vec)
names_vec_b = c('M0 nAb-ID50 BA.4/5 (AU/ml)',
              'M0 IgG S Index (AU/ml)',
              'M0 IgG S BA.4/5 (AU/ml)',
              'M0 IgG N Index (AU/ml)')
 
mk_vec_p = paste0('log10M1', antigen_vec)
names_vec_p = c('M1 nAb-ID50 BA.4/5 (AU/ml)',
              'M1 IgG S Index (AU/ml)',
              'M1 IgG S BA.4/5 (AU/ml)',
              'M1 IgG N Index (AU/ml)')
 
mk_vec_fr = c('frBA45ID50', 'frIGGSpikeIndex', 'frIGGSpikeBA45')
names_vec_fr = c('Fold-rise nAb-ID50 BA.4/5 (AU/ml)',
              'Fold-rise IgG S Index (AU/ml)',
              'Fold-rise IgG S BA.4/5 (AU/ml)')

serum_marker_list <- list(
  "nAb ID50 BA.4/5" = list(
    "M0" = mk_vec_b[1],
    "M1" = mk_vec_p[1],
    "Fold-rise" = mk_vec_fr[1]
  ),
  "IgG S Index" = list(
    "M0" = mk_vec_b[2],
    "M1" = mk_vec_p[2],
    "Fold-rise" = mk_vec_fr[2]
  ),
  "IgG S BA.4/5" = list(
    "M0" = mk_vec_b[3],
    "M1" = mk_vec_p[3],
    "Fold-rise" = mk_vec_fr[3]
  ),
  "IgG N Index" = list(
    "M0" = mk_vec_b[4],
    "M1" = mk_vec_p[4]
  )
)
```

```{r}
print_analysis_helper <- function(df, 
                                  covariates, 
                                  time_var, 
                                  event_var, 
                                  marker_var,
                                  weight_var,
                                  weight_cdf_var, 
                                  tf, 
                                  learner.treatment = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                  learner.event_type = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                  learner.failure_time = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                  learner.censoring_time = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                  readable_name = "", 
                                  header_level = "#####", 
                                  cutoff_risk_monotone = c(0,1), 
                                  cutoff_risk_raw = c(0,1),
                                  cutoff_rr = c(0,10),
                                  comparison_risk = NULL, 
                                  comparison_se = NULL, 
                                  ylim_monotone = NULL, 
                                  ylim_rr = NULL){
  
  cat(sprintf("Marker variable: %s \n", marker_var))
  cat(sprintf("Timeframe: %s \n", tf))
  
  quants <- select_quants(df, event_var, marker_var)
  
  res_temp <- thresholdSurv(data = df , 
                          covariates = covariates,
                          failure_time = time_var, 
                          tf = tf, 
                          event_type = event_var, 
                          marker = marker_var,
                          weights = weight_var,
                          weights_cdf = weight_cdf_var,
                          threshold_list = quants, 
                          learner.treatment = learner.treatment,
                          learner.event_type = learner.event_type, 
                          learner.failure_time = learner.failure_time, 
                          learner.censoring_time = learner.censoring_time,
                          verbose = F, 
                          placebo_risk = comparison_risk,
                          placebo_se = comparison_se)
  
    cat(sprintf("\n\n%s Monotone \n", header_level))

    g1 <- graphthresh(data.frame(res_temp), 
                      type = "monotone",
                      ylabel = sprintf("Probability of COVID disease by %s days", tf),
                      xlabel = sprintf("%s (AU/ml) Thresholds", readable_name),
                      cutoffs = cutoff_risk_monotone,
                      plot_density = T,
                      plot_endpoints = T, 
                      data = df_filter,
                      weights = weight_cdf_var,
                      marker = marker_var,
                      event = event_var,
                      time_var = time_var,
                      tf = tf, 
                      exp10 = T, 
                      ylim = ylim_monotone) 
    
    g1 %>% 
      print()
    
    data.frame(res_temp) %>%
      rename(Thresholdlog10 = threshold, 
             Estimate = estimate_monotone, 
             SE = se, 
             `Lower CI` = ci_lo_monotone, 
             `Upper CI` = ci_hi_monotone) %>% 
      mutate(Threshold = 10^Thresholdlog10) %>% 
      rename(`Threshold (log10)` = Thresholdlog10) %>% 
      select(`Threshold (log10)`, Threshold, rcdf, Estimate, SE, 
             `Lower CI`, `Upper CI`) %>%
      mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(.x, 3))) %>% kable() %>% print()

    cat(sprintf("\n\n%s Not Monotone \n", header_level))
    
    g2 <- graphthresh(data.frame(res_temp), 
                type = "raw",
                ylabel = sprintf("Probability of COVID disease by %s days", tf),
                xlabel = sprintf("%s (AU/ml) Thresholds", readable_name),
                cutoffs = cutoff_risk_raw,
                plot_density = T,
                plot_endpoints = T, 
                data = df_filter,
                weights = weight_cdf_var,
                marker = marker_var,
                event = event_var,
                time_var = time_var,
                tf = tf, 
                exp10 = T) 
    
    g2 %>% 
      print()

    data.frame(res_temp) %>%
      rename(Thresholdlog10 = threshold, 
             Estimate = estimate, 
             SE = se, 
             `Lower CI` = ci_lo, 
             `Upper CI` = ci_hi) %>% 
      mutate(Threshold = 10^Thresholdlog10) %>% 
      rename(`Threshold (log10)` = Thresholdlog10) %>% 
      select(`Threshold (log10)`, Threshold, rcdf, Estimate, SE, 
             `Lower CI`, `Upper CI`) %>%
      mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(.x, 3))) %>% kable() %>% print()
  
    if (!is.null(comparison_risk)){
      
      cat(sprintf("\n\n%s Relative risk (compared to vaccine immunity) \n", header_level))
    
      res_temp <- res_temp %>% 
        mutate(ve_monotone = 1 - ve_monotone, 
               ci_lo = 1 - ve_monotone_ci_hi, 
               ci_hi = 1 - ve_monotone_ci_lo, 
               ve_monotone_ci_hi = ci_hi, 
               ve_monotone_ci_lo = ci_lo) 
  
      graphthresh(data.frame(res_temp), 
                  type = "ve",
                  ylabel = "Relative risk compared to vaccine immunity group",
                  xlabel = sprintf("%s (AU/ml) Thresholds", readable_name),
                  cutoffs = cutoff_rr,
                  plot_density = T,
                  plot_endpoints = T, 
                  data = df_filter,
                  weights = weight_cdf_var,
                  marker = marker_var,
                  event = event_var,
                  time_var = time_var,
                  tf = tf, 
                  exp10 = T, 
                  ylim = ylim_rr)  %>% 
        print()
      
    data.frame(res_temp) %>%
      rename(Thresholdlog10 = threshold, 
             Estimate = ve_monotone, 
             SE = ve_se, 
             `Lower CI` = ve_monotone_ci_lo, 
             `Upper CI` = ve_monotone_ci_hi) %>% 
      mutate(Threshold = 10^Thresholdlog10) %>% 
      rename(`Threshold (log10)` = Thresholdlog10) %>% 
      select(`Threshold (log10)`, Threshold, rcdf, Estimate, SE, `Lower CI`, 
             `Upper CI`) %>%
      mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ signif(.x, 3))) %>% kable() %>% print()
      
    }

}

```

```{r, results = "asis", fig.align='center'}
df_serum_p2 <- df_serum %>% 
  filter(ph2.m1.sera == 1)

weight_var <- "wt.m1.sera"
covariates <- c("riskscore", "HIVBL", "Country")
time_var <- "EventTimePrimary"
event_var <- "EventIndPrimary1"
tf <- 160

res_comparison_overall <- thresholdSurv(data = df_serum %>% filter(hybrid == 0), 
                                        covariates = covariates,
                                        failure_time = time_var, 
                                        tf = tf, 
                                        event_type = event_var, 
                                        marker = "hybrid",
                                        learner.treatment = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                        learner.event_type = Lrnr_sl$new(
                                          learners = list(Lrnr_glm$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_mean$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_gam$new())),
                                        learner.failure_time = Lrnr_sl$new(
                                          learners = list(Lrnr_glm$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_mean$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_gam$new())),
                                        learner.censoring_time = Lrnr_sl$new(
                                          learners = list(Lrnr_glm$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_mean$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_gam$new())),
                                        verbose = F)

for (serum_readable_name in names(serum_marker_list)){
  cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s {.tabset .tabset-fade} \n", serum_readable_name))
  
  for (var_type in names(serum_marker_list[[serum_readable_name]])){
    
    cat(sprintf("\n\n### %s  {.tabset .tabset-fade} \n", var_type))
    
      full_readable_name <- sprintf("%s %s", var_type, serum_readable_name)
      
      marker_var <- serum_marker_list[[serum_readable_name]][[var_type]]
      
      if (var_type == "M1"){
        groups <- c("hybrid", "vaccine1", "vaccine2")
      }
      else{
        groups <- c("hybrid", "vaccine1")
      }
      
      for (group in groups){
        
        if (group == "hybrid"){
          group_num <- 1
        }
        else{
          group_num <- 0
        }
        
        df_filter <- df_serum_p2 %>% filter(hybrid == group_num)
        
        if (group == "hybrid"){
         cat("\n\n#### Hybrid immunity  {.tabset .tabset-fade} \n")
          tf_to_use <- tf 
          covariates_to_use <- covariates 
          risk_comparison <- res_comparison_overall$estimate
          se_comparison <- res_comparison_overall$se
          cutoff_risk_monotone = c(0,0.16)
          cutoff_risk_raw = c(0,1)
          cutoff_rr = c(0,1.6)
          ylim_monotone <- c(0, 0.16, 0.02)
          ylim_rr <- c(0, 1.6, 0.2)
        }
        else if (group == "vaccine1"){
         cat("\n\n#### Vaccine immunity  {.tabset .tabset-fade} \n")
          tf_to_use <- tf 
          covariates_to_use <- covariates 
          risk_comparison <- NULL
          se_comparison <- NULL
          cutoff_risk_monotone = c(0,1)
          cutoff_risk_raw = c(0,1)
          cutoff_rr = c(0,10)
          ylim_rr <- NULL
          if (var_type == "M0"){
            ylim_monotone <- NULL 
          }
          else{
            ylim_monotone <- c(0,0.55, 0.05) 
          }
        }
        else{
         cat("\n\n#### Vaccine immunity (92 days)  {.tabset .tabset-fade} \n")
          tf_to_use <- 92
          covariates_to_use <- "riskscore" 
          risk_comparison <- NULL
          se_comparison <- NULL
          cutoff_risk_monotone = c(0,0.025)
          cutoff_risk_raw = c(0,0.1)
          cutoff_rr = c(0,10)
          ylim_rr <- NULL
          if (var_type == "M0"){
            ylim_monotone <- NULL 
          }
          else{
            ylim_monotone <- c(0,0.025, 0.005) 
          }
        }
        print_analysis_helper(df_filter, 
                              covariates = covariates_to_use,
                              time_var = time_var,
                              event_var = event_var, 
                              marker_var = marker_var,
                              weight_var = weight_var, 
                              weight_cdf_var = weight_var,
                              tf = tf_to_use, 
                              learner.treatment = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                              learner.event_type = Lrnr_sl$new(
                                          learners = list(Lrnr_glm$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_mean$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_gam$new())),
                              learner.failure_time = Lrnr_sl$new(
                                          learners = list(Lrnr_glm$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_mean$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_gam$new())),
                              learner.censoring_time = Lrnr_sl$new(
                                          learners = list(Lrnr_glm$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_mean$new(), 
                                                          Lrnr_gam$new())),
                              readable_name = full_readable_name,
                              cutoff_risk_monotone = cutoff_risk_monotone, 
                              cutoff_risk_raw = cutoff_risk_raw,
                              cutoff_rr = cutoff_rr,
                              comparison_risk = risk_comparison,
                              comparison_se = se_comparison, 
                              ylim_monotone = ylim_monotone, 
                              ylim_rr = ylim_rr)
        }
      }
}

```

# T-cell markers

* **Covariates**: Risk Score 
* **Time variable**: EventTimePrimary
* **Event variable**: EventIndPrimary1
* **Marker variables**: (IFNg OR IL-2, IFNg OR IL-2 OR CD154) x (N BA.4/5, N Index, S BA.4/5, S Index) (for each, baseline and peak). 
  * If less than 0.01%, then set it to be 0.01
* **Phase 1 filter**: ph1.m1.ics == 1
* **Phase 2 (sampling) filter**: ph2.m1.ics == 1
* **Weight variable**: wt.m2.ics
* **Timeframe**: 160 days 
* Performed analysis for hybrid immunity group only 
* M0 = baseline, M1 = peak 
* All learners: GLM

```{r}
T_vec = c('T4')
T_names_vec = c('CD4+')
C_vec = c('C03', 'C04')
C_names_vec = c('IFNg OR IL-2', 'IFNg OR IL-2 OR CD154')
A_vec = c('A02', 'A08', 'A11', 'A13')
A_names_vec = c('N BA.4/5', 'N Index', 'S BA.4/5', 'S Index')
 
 
antigen_vec = NULL
antigen_names_vec = NULL
for (i in 1:length(T_vec)) {
  for (j in 1:length(C_vec)) {
    for (k in 1:length(A_vec)) {
      antigen_vec = c(antigen_vec,
                      paste0(T_vec[i], C_vec[j], A_vec[k]))
      antigen_names_vec = c(antigen_names_vec,
                            paste0(T_names_vec[i], ' ', C_names_vec[j], A_names_vec[k]))
    }
  }
}
 
mk_vec_b = paste0('B', antigen_vec)
names_vec_b = paste0('M0 ', antigen_names_vec, ' (%)')

mk_vec_p = paste0('M1', antigen_vec)
names_vec_p = paste0('M1 ', antigen_names_vec, ' (%)')

fs_markers <- c("B_FS_final", "M1_FS_final", "B_PFS_final", "M1_PFS_final", 
                "B_FS_final_Index", "M1_FS_final_Index", "B_PFS_final_Index", 
                "M1_PFS_final_Index")

process <- function(x) log10(ifelse(x < 0.01, 0.01, x))

df_tcell <-  df_ubuntu %>%
  filter(ph1.m1.ics == 1)

df_tcell_p2 <- df_ubuntu %>%
  filter(ph2.m1.ics == 1)  %>%
  mutate_at(mk_vec_b, process) %>%
  mutate_at(mk_vec_p, process) %>% 
  mutate_at(fs_markers, process) %>% 
  
  # change 6/13/25 - reweighting
  mutate(wt.m1.ics_new = ifelse(EventIndPrimary1 == 0 & AGRP2N == 2.1, 106.5, 
                                ifelse(EventIndPrimary1 == 1 & AGRP2N == 2.1, 1.285714, wt.m1.ics)))

tcell_marker_list <- setNames(lapply(seq_along(antigen_names_vec), 
                               function(i) list(M0 = mk_vec_b[i], M1 = mk_vec_p[i])),
                        antigen_names_vec)

tcell_marker_list[["FS BA4-5"]] <- list(
  "M0" = "B_FS_final", 
  "M1" = "M1_FS_final"
)

tcell_marker_list[["PFS BA4-5"]] <- list(
  "M0" = "B_PFS_final", 
  "M1" = "M1_PFS_final"
)

tcell_marker_list[["FS Ancestral"]] <- list(
  "M0" = "B_FS_final_Index", 
  "M1" = "M1_FS_final_Index"
)
tcell_marker_list[["PFS Ancestral"]] <- list(
  "M0" = "B_PFS_final_Index", 
  "M1" = "M1_PFS_final_Index"
)
```


```{r, results = "asis", fig.align='center'}
weight_var <- "wt.m1.ics_new"
weight_cdf_var <- "wt.m1.ics"
covariates <- c("riskscore")
time_var <- "EventTimePrimary"
event_var <- "EventIndPrimary1"
tf <- 160

res_comparison_overall <- thresholdSurv(data = df_tcell %>% filter(hybrid == 0), 
                                        covariates = covariates,
                                        failure_time = time_var, 
                                        tf = tf, 
                                        event_type = event_var, 
                                        marker = "hybrid",
                                        learner.treatment = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                        learner.event_type = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                        learner.failure_time = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                        learner.censoring_time = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                        verbose = F)

risk_comparison <- res_comparison_overall$estimate
se_comparison <- res_comparison_overall$se


for (tcell_readable_name in names(tcell_marker_list)){
  cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s {.tabset .tabset-fade} \n", tcell_readable_name))
  
  for (var_type in names(tcell_marker_list[[tcell_readable_name]])){
    
    cat(sprintf("\n\n### %s  {.tabset .tabset-fade} \n", var_type))
    
      full_readable_name <- sprintf("%s %s", var_type, tcell_readable_name)
      
      marker_var <- tcell_marker_list[[tcell_readable_name]][[var_type]]
      
        df_filter <- df_tcell_p2 %>% filter(hybrid == 1)

          print_analysis_helper(df_filter, 
                                covariates = covariates,
                                time_var = time_var,
                                event_var = event_var, 
                                marker_var = marker_var,
                                weight_var = weight_var, 
                                weight_cdf_var = weight_cdf_var,
                                tf = tf, 
                                learner.treatment = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                learner.event_type = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                learner.failure_time = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                learner.censoring_time = Lrnr_glm$new(),
                                readable_name = full_readable_name, 
                                header_level = "####", 
                                comparison_risk = risk_comparison, 
                                comparison_se = se_comparison)
        }
}

```
